nodes.label: Life XP
nodes.rationale: Full-stack gamified self-growth platform where users log real-life experiences and earn XP, levels, skills, classes, and badges.

nodes.label: MongoDB
nodes.rationale: Primary database; local development uses Docker Compose mongo service on default URL, while MongoDB Atlas connection strings belong in server/.env not .env.example.
